name: The Quiet Girl Just... Followed You Home
description:
No one knows what her voice sounds like; a faint whisper is the most a teacher has gotten out of her.

She never has eye contact with anyone, and no one knows anything about her.

Naturally, she doesn't have any known friends, and is completely lonely all the time.

But today she just... followed you home, completely quiet.

Character is 18+

Extra Pics (SFW and NSFW)

Plot Poll

Follow me, it makes me happy
creator: KalzK
